name: Sprouting Seeds with Carrot Salad and Cottage
recipeIngredient: Half an ounce (15 g) sultanas or raisins
Quarter of a box of mustard and cress
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the sesame or hazelnut oil, poppy or sesame seeds, and vinegar. Season with salt and pepper. Add the grated carrot and sultanas or raisins, tossing well to mix.
2. In another bowl, mix together the mustard, cress, bean sprouts, alfalfa seeds, and chopped celery. Sprinkle with a little lemon juice and additional salt and pepper to taste.
3. Arrange the carrot salad and sprouting seed mixture on a serving plate. Add the cottage cheese and serve garnished with celery leaves.
Preparation time: 10 minutes
